summary: Completed testing of Auto-Generate Account Codes and Dynamic Business Name features. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified company name displays in sidebar ('My Test Company') and auto-generated account codes work correctly with proper prefixes (Asset=1xxx, Expense=6xxx).

integration_issues.flow: Add Account form - category selection after type change
integration_issues.issue: 422 error when creating account after changing account type - category dropdown may need auto-update when type changes

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions - not affecting functionality (known issue from previous iteration)

frontend: Company name 'My Test Company' displayed in sidebar (dynamic business name feature working)
Chart of Accounts page loads with all account types
Add Account modal opens with auto-generated code
Asset type auto-generates code starting with '1' (showed 1501)
Expense type auto-generates code starting with '6' (showed 6902)
Code dynamically updates when account type changes

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and deleted test accounts during testing (cleanup performed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features fully tested: 1) Auto-generate account codes - Backend API /api/finance/chart-of-accounts/next-code/{account_type} returns sequential codes based on type prefix (Asset=1, Liability=2, Equity=3, Income=4, Expense=6). POST without code or with empty code auto-generates. 2) Dynamic business name - /api/auth/me returns company_name field which is displayed in sidebar instead of static 'E1 ERP'. Both features working correctly.

auto_generate_account_code.auto_create: POST /api/finance/chart-of-accounts without code field auto-generates code
auto_generate_account_code.sequential: Codes increment sequentially within each type
auto_generate_account_code.ui_behavior: Code field is readonly, updates when account type changes

dynamic_business_name.ui_display: Sidebar shows company name instead of 'E1 ERP'

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are fully functional with real MongoDB persistence
